title: oxalis perennans
intro: Oxalis perennans, also known as the wood sorrel, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its potential to reduce inflammation. Oxalis perennans is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing the risk of kidney stones, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and salves, with the leaves also being used as a natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds.
